name: STRATA Skin Sciences, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company Overview We are a medical technology company dedicated to developing, commercializing and marketing innovative products for the treatment of dermatologic conditions. Our products include the XTRAC line of excimer lasers and VTRAC lamp systems utilized in the treatment of psoriasis, vitiligo and various other skin conditions. Our products also include the TheraClear X Acne Therapy System utilized in the treatment of mild to moderate inflammatory, comedonal and pustular acne. Th...
